case_title: PAMELA ABAUNZA VS. CITY COLLEGE OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-14-2014 AT 10:00 AM.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-14-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-14-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY COLLEGE SF WAS REPRESENTED BY AMANDA PEBLER--VITALE AND LEILANI F. BATTISTE--EMPLOYEE. DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOYCELYN PEREZ.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF (RETURNED TO SENDER/INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS/UNABLE TO FORWARD).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-14-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABAUNZA, PAMELA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY COLLEGE OF SAN FRANCISCO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
